# synthetics_client_certificate_v2_check (Data Source)

Reads Synthetics client certificate metadata. Certificate contents and private key passwords are not exposed by this data source. Client certificates are authentication material for synthetic tests. They are separate from CA certificates used as SSL trust material.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "synthetics_client_certificate_v2_check" "mtls" {
  id = 123
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `created_by` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `domain` (String)
- `expires_at` (String)
- `id` (Number) The ID of this resource.
- `name` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
- `updated_by` (String)
